scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: start "AI Backend" cmd /k "npm.cmd run dev --prefix backend" && start "AI Frontend" cmd /k "npm.cmd run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: start "AI Backend" cmd /k "npm.cmd start --prefix backend" && start "AI Frontend" cmd /k "npm.cmd run preview --prefix frontend"
